seo.title: Partner Program — Earn 20% Recurring Commissions | Invoicemonk
seo.description: Join the Invoicemonk Partner Program and earn 20% recurring commissions on every referral. 60-day cookie, real-time dashboard, and multi-currency payouts.

hero.title: Earn 20% Recurring Commissions
hero.description: Refer businesses to Invoicemonk and earn 20% of their subscription revenue — every month, for as long as they stay. You must be a registered Invoicemonk user to apply.

benefits.title: Why Join the Partner Program
benefits.subtitle: Everything you need to build a sustainable referral income stream.

items.title: 20% Recurring Revenue
items.description: Earn 20% of every subscription payment your referrals make — not just the first one, but every single month.

items.title: 60-Day Cookie Window
items.description: Your referral link stays active for 60 days. Even if someone signs up weeks later, you still get credited.

items.title: Real-Time Dashboard
items.description: Track clicks, signups, active customers, and earnings in real time from your Partner Portal.

items.title: Multi-Currency Payouts
items.description: Get paid via Bank Transfer, Wise, or PayPal in your preferred currency. No hidden conversion fees.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps from application to your first commission payout.

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Sign in to your Invoicemonk account and submit your application from the Partner section. It takes less than a minute.

steps.title: Get Approved
steps.description: Our team reviews your application. Once approved, you'll get full access to the Partner Portal and your referral tools.

steps.title: Share Your Link
steps.description: Create a custom referral link with your own short code. Share it on your website, social media, or directly with clients.

steps.title: Earn Commissions
steps.description: When someone signs up through your link and subscribes, you earn 20% recurring commission on every payment they make.

commissions.title: Commission Structure
commissions.subtitle: Transparent, recurring commissions with a clear lifecycle.
commissions.rateLabel: recurring commission on all subscription revenue

stages.description: Commission is created when your referral makes a payment. Held for verification.
After 30 days with no refund or chargeback, the commission is locked and confirmed.
Locked commissions are included in the next payout batch and sent to your chosen payment method.

payouts.title: Payout Methods
payouts.subtitle: Choose how you want to receive your earnings.

methods.name: Bank Transfer
methods.description: Direct deposit to your bank account. Available in most countries.

methods.name: Wise
methods.description: Fast, low-fee international transfers. Ideal for cross-border partners.

methods.name: PayPal
methods.description: Instant payouts to your PayPal account. Available worldwide.

payouts.note: All payouts support multiple currencies. You choose your preferred currency in the Partner Portal.

dashboard.title: Partner Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Everything you need to track and grow your referral business.
features: Total clicks, signups, and active customers
Full referral history with status tracking

terms.title: Program Rules
terms.subtitle: Key rules to keep in mind as a partner.
rules: You must be a registered Invoicemonk user to apply
One referral credit per user — the first valid referral link wins
Your referral link must be active at the time of signup
Self-referrals are automatically detected and excluded
Partners must maintain an active account status
Commissions are voided if a referral requests a refund within 30 days

items.question: Who can join the Partner Program?
items.answer: Any registered Invoicemonk user can apply. Whether you're a freelancer, agency, accountant, or content creator — if you have an audience that could benefit from Invoicemonk, you're welcome to apply.

items.question: How much can I earn?
items.answer: You earn 20% of every subscription payment your referrals make, recurring monthly. There's no cap on earnings. If you refer 10 customers on the Pro plan, you earn 20% of all 10 subscriptions every month.

items.question: How long does the cookie last?
items.answer: Our referral tracking cookie lasts 60 days. If someone clicks your link and signs up within 60 days, you get credited — even if they don't subscribe immediately.

items.question: When do I get paid?
items.answer: Commissions enter a 30-day lock period after the referral's payment. Once locked, they're included in the next payout batch. Payouts are processed regularly.

items.question: Can I refer myself?
items.answer: No. Self-referrals are automatically detected and excluded from the program. The Partner Program is designed for referring others to Invoicemonk.

items.question: What currencies are supported for payouts?
items.answer: We support payouts in multiple currencies via Bank Transfer, Wise, and PayPal. You can set your preferred currency in the Partner Portal.

items.question: How do I create a referral link?
items.answer: Once approved, you can create custom referral links with your own short codes from the Partner Portal. Your links will look like invoicemonk.com/r/your-code.

items.question: What happens if my referral cancels?
items.answer: If a referral cancels or requests a refund within the 30-day lock period, the pending commission is voided. Commissions already locked and paid are not affected.

cta.title: Ready to Start Earning?
cta.subtitle: Join the Invoicemonk Partner Program today and start earning 20% recurring commissions on every referral.
